headline: Tech Titan Blake Edison Exposed: Billions Built on Broken Backs!
subtext: His 'innovation' funded by shocking worker exploitation and hidden offshore accounts.
celebrity_description: A charismatic, sharp-featured man in his late 40s, with perfectly coiffed silver-streaked dark hair, intense blue eyes, and a confident, slightly smug smile. Dressed in a sleek, expensive, custom-tailored dark suit.
scandal_type: Corporate Greed, Wage Theft, Offshore Tax Evasion
story_summary: Blake Edison, CEO of 'FutureWorks Inc.', touted as a disruptor of the gig economy, has been caught red-handed. Investigations reveal his empire was built on systematic underpayment, denied benefits, and manipulated contractor statuses for thousands of workers. Simultaneously, a complex web of shell companies in tax havens siphoned billions, avoiding national taxes while his workers struggled to make ends meet.
image_prompt: A highly detailed, hyperrealistic image of Blake Edison, a charismatic man in his late 40s with silver-streaked dark hair and intense blue eyes, wearing a dark custom suit. He stands in front of a chaotic backdrop of a city skyline at dusk, with digital dollar signs and graphs swirling around him. His face should show a predatory, calculating smirk, subtly hinting at his deception. The lighting should be dramatic and cinematic, with an emphasis on dark shadows and glowing corporate logos in the background. High contrast, sharp focus on his face, evoking a sense of corporate villainy.
